title: sapium marginatum var. stenophyllum
intro: Sapium marginatum var. stenophyllum, also known as the Chinese Sapindus or Stenophyllum, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Ayurvedic practices, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving skin irritations, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of Sapium marginatum var. stenophyllum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments.
